title: Rich Earthy Japanese Mushroom Ramen
description: Indulge in a savory and earthy Japanese ramen dish featuring juicy mushrooms and a hint of orange blossom water, all within a macrobiotic-friendly framework. This recipe brings together the best of Japanese cuisine with a unique twist.
instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the ramen noodles and cook according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms to the pan and cook until they are tender and fragrant.
Add the bonito flakes to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the soy sauce and orange blossom water to the pan and stir to combine.
Combine the cooked noodles and mushroom mixture in a large bowl.
Pour the hot broth over the top and garnish with green onions.
